addGlobalModulator.signature: var addGlobalModulator(var chainIndex, var globalMod, String modName)
addGlobalModulator.description: Adds a and connects a receiver modulator for the given global modulator.

addModulator.signature: var addModulator(var chainIndex, var typeName, var modName)
addModulator.description: Adds a modulator to the given chain and returns a reference.

addStaticGlobalModulator.signature: var addStaticGlobalModulator(var chainIndex, var timeVariantMod, String modName)
addStaticGlobalModulator.description: Adds and connects a receiving static time variant modulator for the given global modulator.

asSampler.description: Returns a reference as Sampler or undefined if no Sampler.

exists.description: Checks if the Object exists and prints a error message on the console if not.

exportState.description: Exports the state as base64 string.

getAttribute.description: Returns the attribute with the given index.

getAttributeId.description: Returns the attribute with the given index.

getAttributeIndex.description: Returns the index of the attribute with the given ID.

getChildSynthByIndex.description: Returns the child synth with the given index.

getCurrentLevel.description: Returns the current peak level for the given channel.

getId.description: Returns the ID of the synth.

getModulatorChain.description: Returns the modulator chain with the given index.

getRoutingMatrix.description: Returns a reference to the routing matrix object of the sound generator.

isBypassed.description: Checks if the synth is bypassed.

restoreState.description: Restores the state from a base64 string.

setAttribute.description: Changes one of the Parameter. Look in the manual for the index numbers of each effect.

setEffectChainOrder.signature: void setEffectChainOrder(bool doPoly, var slotRange, var chainOrder)
setEffectChainOrder.description: Changes the processing order of the effects of this sound generator.

setModulationInitialValue.description: Changes the initial modulation value for the given chain.
